Function.Inference: Slow introduction ending with a tempo change and |: at bar 10.
Main loop body that repeats back to bar 11, ending with :|.

Section.Inference: Introductory section; acts as a slow exposition of the theme.
Primary theme featuring a syncopated melody over steady bass.
Repeats the melodic core of the previous section with a varied ending.
Contrasting section with chromatic descent and held notes.
